headline: Cisco Astrix Talks Highlight AI Agent Security Push For Investors
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire cybersecurity startup Astrix Security. Astrix Security focuses on monitoring and securing AI agents and their connections to enterprise systems. The potential deal would add to Cisco's push into AI focused security and subscription based software. This news relates to Cisco's broader effort to grow its role in cybersecurity alongside its networking business. Cisco has long been known for its networking hardware, but in...

headline: Registration for Keynotes Now Open! Largest-ever COMPUTEX Forum with All-Access Pass; Early Bird Discount Countdown Starts
summary: COMPUTEX 2026, the world's leading exhibition for AI and startups, will be held from June 2 to 5 at the Taipei Nangang Exhibition Center (Halls 1 & 2) and Taipei World Trade Center (Hall 1). Today, the organizer TAITRA announced that the official registration for the highly anticipated COMPUTEX Keynotes is now live.
